intent: Open the What-If page, set a manual baseline, pick INT4 + KV-FP8, and inspect the side-by-side bars, verdict, and citations table.

steps.blind_description: Terminal showing monospaced output with a block of numeric columns. (frame slug: landing)
steps.intent: What-If page loaded; baseline defaults to latest Planner result with a manual-entry fallback.

steps.blind_description: Command-line prompt with recently-emitted lines of hex-coloured log output. (frame slug: manual-baseline)
steps.intent: Switched to manual baseline; four numeric inputs expose weights/KV/prefill/runtime MB.

steps.blind_description: Dark terminal displaying a table of CLI results and a blinking cursor at the bottom. (frame slug: pick-techniques)
steps.intent: Technique picker opened: INT4, INT8, KV-FP8, KV-INT4, LoRA, REAP, SpecDecode, FlashAttn3 available.

steps.blind_description: Shell session showing a command header and a paragraph of structured stdout. (frame slug: side-by-side)
steps.intent: Plotly grouped bar chart shows baseline vs candidate per band (Weights, KV, Prefill, Runtime).

steps.blind_description: Terminal window with a list-style summary and no visible error indicator. (frame slug: verdict-citations)
steps.intent: Verdict banner summarises the delta; citations table lists arXiv papers backing each technique.
